title: Three from the Filling Station
overview: Willy, Kurt and Hans are broke, so they sell their car and open a filling station. Then, they all fall in love with the same girl.

trailers.title: Hallo, Du süße Frau, fahr’ nicht allein - Die Drei von der Tankstelle (1930)
